user.title: Add Changsha Water
user.description: Enter the meter number, login user ID, and captured x-tif-token. These private fields are never pre-filled.

reauth_confirm.title: Update Changsha Water token
reauth_confirm.description: Balance polling is still running, but the details token is expired or unauthorized. Enter the user ID and a newly captured x-tif-token.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Changsha Water
reconfigure.description: Existing private values are not displayed. Re-enter the meter number, user ID, and token.

error.invalid_input: Enter a meter number, numeric user ID, and non-empty token.
error.invalid_auth: The token is expired or cannot access the details API.
error.meter_not_found: The meter is not linked to this user ID.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to validate the water service right now.

init.title: Changsha Water update settings
init.description: The token-free balance endpoint can be polled frequently; the authenticated details endpoint should be polled less often.

token_expired.title: Changsha Water token needs updating
token_expired.description: The details token for {entry_title} is expired or unauthorized. Balance tracking and daily estimates continue. Capture a new token and complete reauthentication.
